summary: Created finalizer.md artifact containing clarified guidance for blog-draft delivery action's Conclusion/CTA injection mandate. The update explicitly limits polished sections to substantive articles while exempting atomic/system responses from this step.
suggestions: Review the finalizer.md artifact before PR creation
Ensure no additional persona updates are pending before merging
Consider scheduling a quick sync with the team on updated polish guidelines
delivery_notes: The artifact clarifies the blog-draft polish mandate to apply Conclusion/CTA only to substantive articles, not atomic acknowledgments. This reduces unnecessary polishing overhead and maintains appropriate brevity for system responses. Ready for GitHub PR creation and review.
